name: Wild Rice with Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour cold wild rice over a fine mesh strainer and lift the rice with fingers to remove any impurities.
2. Combine rice and 1 1/3 cups water in a large saucepan. Add bouillon, green onion, thyme, and bacon pieces.
3. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 60 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, cook the bacon until crisp. Remove from pan and set aside with mushrooms, chopped green onion, and dried thyme.
5. Cook mushrooms until they are soft.
6. Drain any excess fat from the bacon.
7. Add the cooked bacon, mushrooms, and green onion to the rice mixture.
8. Season with pepper and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Note: Wild rice absorbs water more slowly than regular rice, so it may require additional cooking time.
